contract.purpose: Record local verification and blocked live/non-production restore checks for Phase-22.
contract.scope: Local XML/MyGRACE verification, dry-run prerequisites, missing operator inputs, blocked live evidence, and required evidence template for the future restore rehearsal.

module-map.section-local-evidence: Records local documentation and MyGRACE checks that can be run without a backup bundle.
module-map.section-blocked-live-checks: Records checks that require a restore target, backup bundle, or operator cutover approval.
module-map.section-required-dry-run-evidence: Defines evidence needed before Phase-22 can be trusted for a real incident.

change-summary.change-1: v1.0.0 - Phase-22 step-10 recorded blocked non-production dry-run evidence boundaries.

local-evidence.check-3: Runbook, backup contract, validation gates, cutover gates, and rollback gates are documented.
local-evidence.check-4: No deploy/, install.sh, runtime source, or live server state was changed by Phase-22 local execution.

blocked-live-checks.blocked-1: Non-production pg_dump/pg_restore rehearsal was not performed because no backup bundle was available in the local workspace.
blocked-live-checks.blocked-2: Restore-target VPS validation was not performed because no separate RU/DE restore target credentials or hosts were provided.
blocked-live-checks.blocked-3: RU/DE live tunnel health, AWG profile parity, and existing client/device connectivity were not validated on replacement servers.
blocked-live-checks.blocked-4: DNS/IP/operator cutover was not attempted and must remain operator-controlled.

required-dry-run-evidence.required-1: Trusted backup bundle with manifest.json, postgres.dump, runtime-env.enc, vpn-state.tar.enc, checksums.sha256, and evidence directory.
required-dry-run-evidence.required-2: Isolated non-production PostgreSQL restore target or replacement RU/DE rehearsal environment.
required-dry-run-evidence.required-7: Application validation notes for backend health, DB, Redis, auth smoke, billing read path, device listing, frontend, and admin.
required-dry-run-evidence.required-8: Operator go/no-go and rollback target decision before any production cutover.

phase-closure-policy.policy-1: Phase-22 may be considered locally prepared but not live-verified until non-production restore evidence is attached.
phase-closure-policy.policy-2: Do not rely on Phase-22 for a real incident without completing the blocked dry-run and live-required evidence gates.
